Notice Of Motion And Motion For The Issuance Of An Affidavit Of Identiry In Support Of Pltf'S Request For The Issuance Of An Abstract Of Judgemnt And Writ Of Execution Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 674(C)(1) And 680.135
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
ASSIGNEE OF PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION'S Motion For The Issuance Of An Affidavit Of Identity In Support Of Plaintiff's Request For The Issuance Of An Abstract Of Judgemnt And Writ Of Execution Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 674(C)(1) And 680.135 is
Granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Not reported. = (301/EHG)
